study_goal: Identify causal biomarkers and key cell types driving Parkinson's disease via mitophagy; integrate MR with scRNA-seq to prioritize genes, localize to cell states, and propose a translational shortlist.
notes: Open to Pattern A (mechanism gene-set) with a Pattern B (key-cell) complement. Prioritize dopaminergic neurons, microglia, and astrocytes. Include pQTL instruments where feasible. Aim for colocalization and SMR in main text if power allows.
